Bash(cat /home/edgar/.claude/projects/-home-edgar-projects-bim-eskd/0a92c9b6-3d20-4cb2-8e2b-3b98f0e705b3/tool-results/mcp-bonsai-get_scene_info-1772370048526.txt | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.loads\(json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)['result']\)
objects = data.get\('objects', []\)

# Collect shelves \(IfcPlate\) and shelf frames \(IfcMember with 'Shelf' in name\)
plates = [o for o in objects if o.get\('ifc_class'\) == 'IfcPlate']
members = [o for o in objects if o.get\('ifc_class'\) == 'IfcMember']
miners = [o for o in objects if 'Miner' in o.get\('name', ''\) or 'miner' in o.get\('name', ''\).lower\(\) or 'Antminer' in o.get\('name', ''\)]
proxies = [o for o in objects if o.get\('ifc_class'\) == 'IfcBuildingElementProxy']

print\('=== IfcPlate \(полки\) ==='\)
for p in sorted\(plates, key=lambda x: x.get\('name', ''\)\):
    print\(f\\"  {p.get\('name'\)}: z={p.get\('z', 'N/A'\)}\\"\)

print\(\)
print\('=== IfcMember \(стойки/ригели/рамки\) ==='\)
for m in sorted\(members, key=lambda x: x.get\('name', ''\)\):
    print\(f\\"  {m.get\('name'\)}: z={m.get\('z', 'N/A'\)}\\"\)

print\(\)
print\(f'=== IfcBuildingElementProxy \(всего {len\(proxies\)}\) ==='\)
# Show a few samples
names = sorted\(set\(p.get\('name', ''\) for p in proxies\)\)
print\(f'  Unique names: {len\(names\)}'\)
for n in names[:5]:
    print\(f'  {n}'\)
print\(f'  ...'\)
for n in names[-5:]:
    print\(f'  {n}'\)
")
